successor: SAP AG (via Platinum Equity -> Accrue Software)
notes: Cambridge MA; founded 1986; acquired by D&B 1994; spun to Cognizant 1996; sold to Platinum Equity 1997; sold to Accrue Software 2000; management buyout 2002; acquired by SAP February 2007; product rebranded SAP Strategy Management
Parent company formed 1996 from D&B spinoffs including Pilot Software; split into IMS Health and Nielsen Media Research in 1998
Partnership with Pilot for personal cube distribution via email; small BI software firm
Boston-based IT analyst firm; publisher of this profile
Previous owner of Pilot Software before 1994 acquisition and 1996 Cognizant spinoff; D&B still active as business data company
